notes: v0.50.1: Fix DOC_PACK_ID version fields to match packaged content (metadata-only).
v0.48.0: run_scenario writes ScenarioSource.yaml + BaselineToolSurface.json + per-step ToolSurface.json (runner-produced evidence).
v0.48.0: grade_scenario computes deterministic scenario-level tool reuse (ToolSurface diffs + local import-closure reachability).
v0.48.0: grade_pack/grade_scenario patch_scope_not_violated check fixed to use patch_scope.verdict.
v0.47.0: Phase6 run_pack now carries tool_delta/skill_delta/tags into Plan.json & CONTEXT.json (grader-visible, prompt-hidden).
v0.47.0: run_pack materialize writes BaselineToolSurface.json; grade_pack enforces tool_delta via file-surface diff.
v0.47.0: Fix outdated core scenario schema (add execution + overlay mode).
v0.47.0: Fix skill file frontmatter + heading normalization for regen determinism.
v0.47.0: Replace broken Lindley recursion reference with accessible arXiv/Euclid sources; enrich Little's law refs.
